title: Port Archived Changes
description: TypeScript surface for **Port Archived Changes** on `SpecdDataPort`, mirroring the HTTP routes in the paired `api:routes-*` group. UI hooks call these methods; adapters implement them over HTTP or IPC.
context: TypeScript surface for **Port Archived Changes** on `SpecdDataPort`, mirroring the HTTP routes in the paired `api:routes-*` group. UI hooks call these methods; adapters implement them over HTTP or IPC.

rules:
The interface MUST declare asynchronous methods equivalent to the HTTP routes in the matching `api:routes-*` group:

- `getArchivedChange(name)` → `ChangeDetailDto` with `state: 'archived'` and `archivedMeta` populated from `GET /v1/archived-changes/{name}`

rules.requirement: listArchived maps archive list rows for Studio sidebar
rules: `listArchived()` on `port-changes-collection` MUST call `GET /v1/archived-changes` and map each `{ name, archivedName }` row to `ChangeSummaryDto` with `name` (and optional `description` from `archivedName` for tooling). The sidebar Archive section MUST NOT render per-row `state: archived` labels; section title suffices.

rules.requirement: port signatures are identical for HTTP and IPC adapters
rules: Implementations (`adapter-remote-specd-data`, desktop IPC) MUST implement these methods without altering parameter or return types.

rules.requirement: port failures surface as typed client errors
rules: HTTP failures MUST be translated by `adapter-problem-json-errors` into errors the UI hooks can display.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Port methods mirror routes contract
then: each method maps to documented /v1 route

scenarios.name: List changes hits collection HTTP route
when: listChanges() is called on remote adapter
then: AND response parses to typed rows

scenarios.name: IPC adapter exposes same method names
when: desktop IPC adapter handles port call
then: method name and arity match interface
AND return shape matches HTTP path
